metadata.description: CWA uses mean-field fixed-point iteration with learnable coupling J. Hybrid IFT/unrolled backprop. Tested against 8 baselines across depths 6/10/20 on CIFAR-10 (Exp1) and fixed-J ablation (Exp4). NOTE: Experiment in progress - partial results shown.

examples.input: Train 6-layer unnormalized MLP with relu activation on CIFAR-10 (hidden_dim=256, batch=256, epochs=25, seeds=3). Measure gradient ratio and test accuracy.
examples.output: CWA hypothesis: gradient ratio < 2.0 (stable) vs GELU > 5.0 (vanishing/exploding), competitive accuracy within 5pp of GELU.

examples.input: Train 10-layer MLP on CIFAR-10 with fixed J=0.1 CWA (hidden_dim=256, seeds=3). Fixed-J ablation.
examples.output: Learned J should outperform fixed J by finding SOC critical point.

examples.input: Train 10-layer MLP on CIFAR-10 with fixed J=0.3 CWA (hidden_dim=256, seeds=3). Fixed-J ablation.
examples.output: Learned J should outperform fixed J by finding SOC critical point.

examples.output: Learned J should outperform fixed J by finding SOC critical point.

examples.output: Learned J should outperform fixed J by finding SOC critical point.

examples.input: Train 10-layer MLP on CIFAR-10 with learned J (CWA) (hidden_dim=256, seeds=3). Learned J ablation.
examples.output: Learned J should self-organize to SOC and achieve best gradient stability.

examples.input: Evaluate CWA hypothesis: gradient ratio < 2.0 on ≥10-layer unnormalized networks vs GELU > 5.0. Datasets: CIFAR-10. Depths: [6, 10, 20]. Seeds: 3.
examples.output: CONFIRM if CWA ratio < 2.0 AND GELU > 5.0 at depth≥10. DISCONFIRM if accuracy delta < 0.5pp. INCONCLUSIVE otherwise.
